title: Midnight Craving Jamaican Condensed Milk Pudding
description: A dense and creamy pudding made with condensed milk, a hint of mustard, and a touch of sweetness from Jamaican candies. Perfect for a midnight craving.

ingredients.name: crushed jamaican candy (e.g. peanut brittle, toffee)

instructions: Whisk together the condensed milk, mustard, sugar, rum (if using), and golden syrup in a medium saucepan.
Add the chopped scotch bonnet peppers and whisk until smooth.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and reaches 180°F (82°C).
Remove from heat and stir in the butter, flour, and crushed candy until fully incorporated.
In a separate bowl, whisk the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
Fold the egg yolks into the cream with a rubber spatula until fully incorporated.
Stir in the vanilla extract and pour the mixture into individual serving cups or ramekins.
Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or until chilled and set.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional crushed candy if desired.
Note: If using rum, the pudding may become slightly more runny. If this happens, simply refrigerate for an additional 30 minutes or until set.
